name: moapi

metadata.name: moapi
metadata.summary: Simple and lightweight Object-Document Mapper and simplified query syntax for query-string REST APIs

documentation:
# Mongo API

A simple to use Object Document Mapping Library that also provides a quick and simple
query-string syntax for REST APIs.

methods.name: moapi.mocks.connection.mongo_parameters.MongoDBParametersMock.db
documentation:
Returns an instance of MongoMock that will behave like
a real MongoDB instance but runs entirely from memory
and does not require an actual MongoDB instance.
:return:

classes.name: moapi.models.core.custom_pydantic_fields.MongoObjectId
documentation:
Custom field that handles properly BSON's ObjectId type within a
Pydantic schema

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.SkipError
documentation: Raised when skip is negative / bad value.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.LimitError
documentation: Raised when limit is negative / bad value.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.ListOperatorError
documentation: Raised list operator was not possible.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.FilterError
documentation: Raised when parse filter method fail to find a valid match.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.TextOperatorError
documentation: Raised when parse text operator contain an empty string.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.CustomCasterError
documentation: Raised when a custom cast fail.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.ProjectionError
documentation: Raised when projection json is invalid.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.LogicalPopulationError
documentation: Raised when method fail to find logical population item.

classes.name: moapi.moql.errors.LogicalSubPopulationError
documentation: Raised when method fail to find logical sub population item.

classes.name: moapi.moql.filter_handler.MoQLFilter
documentation:
Builds mongo filters based on the filter parameters
provided.

Example input: status=DISCOVERED

The property mongo_query provides the equivalent
mongo filter element

Example: {"status": "DISCOVERED"}

functions.name: moapi.odm.entity_service.traverse_cursor_and_copy
documentation:
Helper function that creates a local copy in-memory
of the results obtained after traversing a cursor
that is created as a result of a query with high
projection. This enables data transformations on the
results without losing the state of the returned
documents.
\:param cursor: Iterable cursor that points to the
results from the query.
\:return: A local copy (stored in Heap memory segment)
of results (List of dictionaries).

functions.name: moapi.odm.entity_service.model_to_document
documentation:
Converts an instance of a model to a dictionary that can be stored as a
MongoDB Document.

```
param model

Instance

return

dictionary representation of the model
```

methods.name: moapi.odm.entity_service.EntityService.get
documentation:
Get a list of documents on the given collection based
on a filter (represented in Python as a dictionary).
\:param limit:
\:param skip:
\:param query: A dictionary containing a valid MongoDB
filter
\:return: Local copy of results

methods.name: moapi.odm.entity_service.EntityService.get_typed
documentation:
Get a list of documents on a given collection based on a
mongo query. Documents are returned as instances of models
instead of plain dictionaries.
\:param limit: sets the maximum amount of results the query
will return
\:param skip: sets the amount of documents to be skipped
\:param query: Dictionary containing the mongo query
\:return: List of instances of VAPModel derived classes

methods.name: moapi.odm.entity_service.EntityService.add_one_typed
documentation:
Saves entity to database
\:param model: An instance of a class that extends VAPModel
\:return:

functions.name: moapi.moql.date_parser.parse_date
documentation:
Cast string date into datetime using dateparse library.

Args:
    date (str): Date as string format.

 Returns:
    Optional[datetime]: Cast value.

functions.name: moapi.moql.regex_parser.parse_regex
documentation:
Convert regex to pattern to mongo db regex query

Args:
    regex (str): Regex pattern in string format.

 Returns:
    Optional[string]: Regex as mongo db query

functions.name: moapi.moql.projection_handler.field_has_to_be_excluded_from_projection
documentation: FUNCTION FIELD HAS TO BE EXCLUDED FROM RESULTS

classes.name: moapi.moql.projection_handler.MoQLProjection
documentation:
Converts projection parameters into MongoDB
Projection format

methods.name: moapi.adapters.query_string.QueryString.verify_field_exists_as_property_in_model
documentation: METHOD VERIFY EXISTS AS PROPERTY IN MODEL
